error_signature: changes not reflected in nested subworkflow
title: Changes not reflected in nested subworkflow after saving
symptom: After making changes to a nested subworkflow, the updates do not appear when executing the workflow, despite being visible in the editor.
applies_when: Changes made in the latest version of n8n
not_this_if: Changes are made in the main workflow instead of a subworkflow
root_cause: In n8n version 2.0 and later, simply saving a subworkflow does not apply changes. You must publish the subworkflow for the changes to take effect, as the older 'Activate' toggle has been replaced with a publishing mechanism.
fix_steps: Open the subworkflow in the editor
Click on the 'Publish' button to apply the changes
Run the workflow again to see the updates
agent_instruction: Ensure to publish the subworkflow after making changes to see them reflected in executions.
